productDisplayName: Lee Cooper Men Black Formal Shoes
description: These formal shoes are the most fashionable way to to get formal with comfort. This pair of formal shoes from lee cooper is a fashion forward choice which will give all-day comfort. Pair it with crisp formal trousers, a full sleeve shirt and a coordinating belt. Upper Genuine leather upper with reinforced overlay on the heel Slip on styling with elasticated inserts on the sides of the tongue for ease of wear Diagonal stitch detailing on the forefoot Soft sock-liner for instep comfort Brand badge on the lateral side of the mid-foot Mid-sole Shock absorbing EVA mid-sole Out-sole TPR out-sole with a stacked heel Textured, metallic toned grooves on the forefoot and heel for grip and traction shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
